creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Tortise <tortise@paradise.net.nz> -----

From: Tortise <tortise@paradise.net.nz>
Subject: Re: i386/134106: [boot] Dell Dimension XPS R400 fail to boot on CF IDE
To: remko@elvandar.org
Cc: linimon@freebsd.org, freebsd-i386@freebsd.org

Hi Remko

As best I can tell the A13 BIOS was the latest written for that model, see
http://support.ap.dell.com/support/downloads/driverslist.aspx?os=WNT5&osl=EN&catid=1&impid=-1&servicetag=SZ9XX&SystemID=DIM_PNT_PII_XPS_R___&hidos=WW1&hidlang=en&TabIndex=

From the ftp link given below the same (latest) file exists:

  7/5/2001  1:07 PM       558688 XPSR_A13.EXE

As it was the latest it may be the problem is still in the latest - or it may be arising from outside the BIOS - which is why I made 
the post.

Kind regards
David Hingston

----- End forwarded message -----
